eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Shasta, CA; at 5:08 PM on JUL 18, 2026 Effective until 9:08 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Shasta County Sheriff has ordered mandatory evacuations on the north side of Elk Trail East, east of Dry Creek Road, due to fire activity nearby.
